title: Idhuvarai En Nenjai Lyrics Muran Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Idhuvarai,
en nenjai theendiyadhillai poomazhai
Mudhal murai,
nanaithu chendraai uyirin vervarai
Idhuvarai,
nirangal maariyadhillai vaanilai
Mudhalmurai,
nee vandhaai vaanavil aanadhu soolnilai

Aaanal idhuvarai,
En naatkal thanimayil veenaai ponadhu
Unnaal mudhalmurai,
En ovvoru nodiyum azhagaai aanadhu
Yenno idhuvarai,
pala mozhigal irundhum vaarthai thozhaindhadhu
Unnaal mudhalmurai,
Mounam kooda kadhaigal pesudhu

Idhuvarai,
en nenjai theendiyadhillai poomazhai
Mudhal murai,
nanaithu chendraai uyirin vervarai
Idhuvarai,
nirangal maariyadhillai vaanilai
Mudhalmurai,
nee vandhaai vaanavil aanadhu soolnilai

Kaattrile mirandidum illai rasithathillai, idhuvarai
Kaagidham asaivadhum azhagengiren naan, mudhalmurai
Kadal alai virumbiyum kaal nanaithathillai, idhuvarai
Panithuli thottadhum sugam engiren naan, mudhalmurai

Yenoo idhuvarai,
puyal vandhu modhiyum saaindhadhillai
Aaanaal mudhalmurai,
Mayil iragondru urasi aadi ponen

Yeeno idhuvarai
manam solvadhai kettkum endru irundhen
Aanaal mudhalmurai
therindhe muludhaai naan envasam elandhen

Saalayin orangal naan paarthathillai, idhuvarai
Indruthaan kaankiren poondhottangal angu, mudhalmurai
Sooriyan velichamum ennai suttathilali, idhuvarai
Minmini oliyile karaikiren naan, mudhalmurai

Yenno idhuvarai
vetkangal enmel soolnthathillai
Aanaal mudhalmurai
Indha maatram yethanaal puriyavillai

Yenno idhuvarai
vennilavum ennai theendavillai
Aanaal mudhalmurai
un vatta pottil otti kondaen

Idhuvarai,
en nenjai theendiyadhillai poomazhai
Mudhal murai,
nanaithu chendraai uyirin vervarai
Idhuvarai,
nirangal maariyadhillai vaanilai
Mudhalmurai,
nee vandhaai vaanavil aanadhu soolnilai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Idhuvarai En Nenjai?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional journey of the characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

Naresh Iyer and Saindhavi lend their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who composed the music for Muran?

The music for the movie was composed by Sajan Madhav.

What is the release year of the movie Muran?

The movie was released in 2011.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song underscores the emotional connection between the characters, adding depth to the narrative.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Idhuvarai En Nenjai is a poignant melody from the movie Muran, capturing the essence of love and introspection. Sung by Naresh Iyer and Saindhavi, the song beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and connection between the characters. Sajan Madhav's composition, paired with Priyan's heartfelt lyrics, creates a soothing yet melancholic atmosphere. This track resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhuvarai En Nenjai from the movie Muran is a captivating duet that beautifully blends Naresh Iyer's soulful voice with Saindhavi's melodious tones. The song, composed by Sajan Madhav, evokes a sense of longing and romance, making it a perfect choice for those reflective moments. Dive into this enchanting track and experience the emotional depth that Priyan's lyrics bring to life.
stanzaMeanings: Until now, my heart was untouched like a flower rain. For the first time, you drenched me to the core of my soul. Until now, the colors didn't change in the sky. For the first time, you came and the rainbow surrounded me.

But until now, my days were wasted in loneliness. Because of you, for the first time, every moment became beautiful. Somehow until now, even with many languages, words failed. Because of you, for the first time, even silence tells stories.

Until now, my heart was untouched like a flower rain. For the first time, you drenched me to the core of my soul. Until now, the colors didn't change in the sky. For the first time, you came and the rainbow surrounded me.

In the wind, I didn't float or enjoy until now. For the first time, I find beauty in the movement of paper. Even though I loved the waves, my feet weren't wet until now. For the first time, I find joy in touching a drop of dew.
Somehow until now, storms came and hit but didn't bend me. But for the first time, I danced with a peacock feather.
Somehow until now, I waited for my heart to be heard. But for the first time, I completely lost myself.

Until now, I didn't see the colors of the street. Only now, I see the flower gardens there for the first time. Until now, the sunlight didn't burn me. For the first time, I melt in the light of a firefly.
Somehow until now, fears didn't surround me. But for the first time, I can't understand this change.
Somehow until now, even the full moon didn't touch me. But for the first time, I was caught in your circle.

Until now, my heart was untouched like a flower rain. For the first time, you drenched me to the core of my soul. Until now, the colors didn't change in the sky. For the first time, you came and the rainbow surrounded me.
